summary: Disappointing set ending with a first‑time performance that reviewers felt ruined the show; recording quality not addressed.
review: The sole review is highly critical, describing the new song debut as a "shitty way to end a set" and suggesting it should have been omitted. No information about the source or clarity of the audio was provided, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a 1‑star rating; no positive comments or additional data to adjust the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on recording quality were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the new song was a poor choice to close the set, indicating an unsatisfying flow.
